userAuthoredText:
The approved scope is:

1. Fully implement and operationalize the Portable Evidence-Gated Verification Framework in this repository.
2. Create the required reusable profiles and the authenticated, adequacy-witnessed PHOSPHENE project verification binding.
3. Build the PHOSPHENE native graph and executor architecture required by `PHOSPHENE-GOAL.md`.
4. Implement the complete PHOSPHENE Compatibility Goal through that verified native execution path.

No part of this scope may be reduced, deferred into future phases, converted into optional work, or accepted partially.

Implementation order does not alter the obligation or create permission to stop.

Preserve this section verbatim as the user-authored source of the approved-scope record.
userAuthoredTextSource: User /execute directive, 2026-07-16, section 'APPROVED SCOPE' — preserved verbatim as instructed; the structured items below index this text and do not replace it.

approvedScopeItems.title: Fully implement and operationalize the Portable Evidence-Gated Verification Framework in this repository
Create the required reusable profiles and the authenticated, adequacy-witnessed PHOSPHENE project verification binding
Build the PHOSPHENE native graph and executor architecture required by PHOSPHENE-GOAL.md
Implement the complete PHOSPHENE Compatibility Goal through that verified native execution path

acceptedVersions.milkdrop: per PHOSPHENE-GOAL.md Source Authority — released MilkDrop source and format documentation, projectM, Butterchurn as corroborating implementation
acceptedVersions.plane9: per PHOSPHENE-GOAL.md Source Authority — .p9c scene graphs, retained binaries, official documentation

requiredCorpora: retained, versioned preset/scene corpus per PHOSPHENE-GOAL.md Scope of Accepted Formats (exercises scope; does not define completeness)
completionConditions: PHOSPHENE-GOAL.md §Completion Condition — all conditions listed there
framework spec §4 — the project passes only when every requirement inside approved scope has a current PASS result; the global verify command is the sole completion gate
